meta.verified_via: Direct URL verification of committees.docs.intersectmbo.org (all committee meeting minutes pages checked)
meta.notes: Previous versions of this file incorrectly stated CCC and GMC had zero minutes. This has been corrected.

meetings.notes: Most prolific documentation. Includes joint session with Intersect Board. Google Drive recording links on individual meeting pages.
Consistent weekly minutes. Decision logs are a strong accountability feature unique to TSC. Google Drive recording links on individual meeting pages.
Weekly meetings. Dense schedule during budget season (Apr-Jul 2025). No recordings found on checked pages.
Detailed minutes with attendees, decisions, and action items. Google Drive recording links on individual meeting pages.
Comprehensive minutes with discussion tables, action items. Google Drive recording links on individual meeting pages.
Google Drive recording links on individual meeting pages. Longest public documentation history.
Documentation stops at October 2024. No minutes found for 2025 or 2026.
Page exists with format change notice but no individual meeting minutes found as of Apr 2026.
New for 2026. No public documentation found.

board.detail_level: Moderately detailed — includes attendees, conflict declarations, motions, voting outcomes, and action items. Does not include verbatim transcripts.
board.notes: Published at board.docs.intersectmbo.org. Minutes include substantive discussion summaries and formal votes.

summary.note: 8 of 10 committees publish meeting minutes. The board publishes minutes (27 meetings since Dec 2023). Only MCC and Oversight Committee lack clear public minutes. 5 committees (OSC, TSC, CPC, CCC, GMC) publish Google Drive recordings on individual meeting pages. Budget Committee and ISC do not appear to have recordings.
